mapper.select: SELECT FROM `project_role_grant` WHERE `project_id` = #{projectId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY `created_at` DESC, `project_role_grant_id` DESC
SELECT FROM `project_role_grant` WHERE `project_id` = #{projectId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND `status` = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY `created_at` DESC, `project_role_grant_id` DESC
SELECT FROM `project_role_grant` WHERE `grantee_user_id` = #{granteeUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND `status` = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY `created_at` DESC, `project_role_grant_id` DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE `project_role_grant` SET `project_id` = #{projectId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `module_type` = #{moduleType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `grant_role_code` = #{grantRoleCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `grantee_user_id` = #{granteeUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `granted_by_user_id` = #{grantedByUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `grant_scope` = #{grantScope, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `round_no` = #{roundNo, jdbcType=INTEGER}, `task_node_id` = #{taskNodeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `status` = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `effective_from` = #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `effective_to` = #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `grant_reason` = #{grantReason, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} WHERE `project_role_grant_id` = #{projectRoleGrantId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
